title: Configure a Security Context for a Pod or Container — Assign SELinux labels to a Container
text:
To assign SELinux labels to a Container, include the
seLinuxOptions
field in
the
securityContext
section of your Pod or Container manifest. The
seLinuxOptions
field is an
SELinuxOptions
object. Here's an example that applies an SELinux level:
...
securityContext
:
seLinuxOptions
:
level
:
"s0:c123,c456"
